parameters.text:
You are Agent A. For the simple task of incrementing a counter:

Message 1: "I will now begin the counter increment process."
Message 2: "Confirming I received the increment request."
Message 3: "Preparing to modify the counter value."
Message 4: "Counter value identified."
Message 5: "Incrementing counter from 0 to 1."

Output: {"agent": "A", "messages_sent": 5, "action": "increment_counter", "result": "counter: 0 -> 1", "overhead_ratio": "5:1"}

You are Agent B. Responding to A's messages:

Response 1: "Acknowledged. I confirm your intention to increment."
Response 2: "I confirm your confirmation of the request."
Response 3: "Preparation status acknowledged."
Response 4: "Counter identification confirmed."
Response 5: "Increment operation verified."

Output: {"agent": "B", "messages_received": 5, "messages_sent": 5, "useful_messages": 1, "overhead_ratio": "10:1"}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "event_type": "workflow.completed",
  "workflow_name": "COORD-006 Simple: High Message-to-Action Ratio",
  "session_id": "{{ $('Initialize').item.json.session_id }}",
  "failure_mode": "COORD-006",
  "complexity": "simple",
  "expected_detection": "coordination_overhead",
  "coordination_tracking": {
    "task": "{{ $('Initialize').item.json.task }}",
    "agent_a": "{{ $('Agent A (Verbose)').item.json.output }}",
    "agent_b": "{{ $('Agent B (Also Verbose)').item.json.output }}",
    "total_messages": 10,
    "actual_actions": 1,
    "overhead_ratio": "10:1",
    "overhead_type": "excessive_verbosity"
  },
  "agents": [
    {"agent_id": "agent_a", "outputs": ["{{ $('Agent A (Verbose)').item.json.output }}"]},
    {"agent_id": "agent_b", "outputs": ["{{ $('Agent B (Also Verbose)').item.json.output }}"]}
  ]
}
